text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I could really go for some ramen right now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The words suddenly spill out of Fine Motion, and
a chill instantly spreads throughout the room.
choice_data_list: (What does she have in store today?!)
(What does she have in store today?!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Whenever she's muttered about ramen in the
past, something always happens without fail. For
example...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I could really go for some ramen right now.
choice_data_list: There's a place nearby. Want to stop by?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hm... No, that's not what I'm craving right now.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I've got it! Let's procure a food truck!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I'd like to make ramen to match the intensity
I'm feeling with my own two hands! Right away!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And then, on a different day...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! Let's make our own ramen alley here
at the academy!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Come along, Trainer. Let's go speak with the
director! I'm counting on your diplomatic savvy! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: How are you with airplanes, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
There's a type of ramen I'd like to eat right now,
but we'll never get there unless we go by air.
Come on, let's fly!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our ramen-related adventures have continued
ever since, showing me a passion in Fine Motion
the likes of which I'd never imagined. At this
point, I have no idea what to expect.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
So there's some ramen I've been wanting to try for
ages... Would you like to try it with me?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Um... yes? I just feel like trying something new.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
There are three I've been curious about. Could
you choose which one we try?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Putting it simply, the choices are chashu pork ramen, soupless aburasoba ramen, or spicy tan tan noodles! Which do you think sounds best?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I think you might be surprised. I can't wait!

text_block_list.name: Ramen Shop Owner
text_block_list.text: Aaand... order up! One Tower of Chashu!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Grrrowl...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're presented with a bowl of soy sauce ramen
topped with a stack of chashu pork slices so high,
it truly towers over us!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Wow... It's like seeing the Tower of Babel in its
completed glory!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! A ladder, please! I'm going to start from
the summit!
choice_data_list: You're going to eat all that by yourself?!
You're going to eat all that by yourself?!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe. To whom do you think you're speaking?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Make no mistake, I will finish this. I swear on my
family's honor!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Fine Motion eats her way down the pork
tower until...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
That hit the spot! ♪
Phew! That was superb, Chef!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Incredibly, Fine Motion has actually conquered
the whole tower by herself!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oho... So we're really doing this? We're entering the zone?!

text_block_list.name: Ramen Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
Aaand... order up! Enjoy your XXXtra Garlic
Aburasoba!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We suddenly find ourselves caught in the eye of a
raging garlic storm!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Ngh! Th-this is—

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
Your Highness, it's far too dangerous! What
you've been served can hardly be called ramen!
It's just a mound of chopped garlic!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
No, I cannot run from this. No matter the form it
takes, if it assumes the title of "ramen"...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I shall bestow my love upon it! Here I go!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hyaaah! Phew... One more lap!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Someone's looking sharp—wait, huh? What's that
weird sign you're wearing?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
"Please do not come within a one-kilometer
radius of me. -Fine"

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...What the?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
What?! Shakur?! Y-you mustn't! It says to stay
away! No fair!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In a rare sight, today I get to see Air Shakur
chasing Fine Motion around.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...So you're okay with this, right? Even though
there's no telling how I'll end up?

text_block_list.name: Ramen Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
Aaand... order up! Here's your Molten Menkib
Tan Tan Noodles!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Named after the beautiful star Menkib, this soup
is so spicy, it shares the star's same pale blue hue.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Please, grant me the power to get through this...
Here goes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whooooosh!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
What's this? I'm... running? I'm rounding the
fourth corner and moving onto the final straight...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Zoooom!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Ah, it's coming! And a such terrible speed!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: It's s-s-SPIIIICYYYY!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Ngh... Yesh. Yah. Ah shink... ah'll be... ogay...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, th-that's spicy... It's spicy, but I feel like I've
learned something from this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
True to her words, Fine Motion pulls off a
staggering performance at training the next day.
